title: ipomoea phylloneura
intro: Ipomoea phylloneura, also known as morning glory, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Convolvulaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been utilized to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ipomoea phylloneura include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of Ipomoea phylloneura can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their effects.
